calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Off Calendar

Defendant Emily Advincula'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jerome Schweich, Esq., 415-447-9000 for defendant and moving party Emily Advincula
Thomas Hesketh, Esq. of, 415-756-0335 specially appearing for plaintiff and opposing party U.S. Bank National

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
Defendant Emily Advincula's Motion For Summary Judgment IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF'S RELIANCE ON CCP 1161(3) IS MISPLACED BECAUSE THAT SECTION ONLY APPLIES IF THERE IS A FAILURE TO PERFORM A CONDITION OF THE LEASE OR AGREEMENT UNDER WHICH THE PROPERTY IS HELD AS OPPOSED TO AN INDEPENDENT STATUTORY OBLIGATION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jerome Schweich, Esq., 415-447-9000 for defendant and moving party Emily Advincula
Terri Brewer, Esq., 925-945-1481 specially appearing for plaintiff and opposing party U.S. Bank National

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court VACATED IT TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUED DEFENDANT EMILY ADVINCULA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO MARCH 19, 2010. OPPOSITION WAS FILED ON MARCH 16, 2010, A COPY OF WHICH WAS GIVEN IN OPEN COURT. Parties submitted forms of order for The Courts's review.Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Continued To Mar-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff U.S. Bank National, is present.
Attorney, James Watson, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Emily Advincula, is present.
Attorney, Jermey Reyes, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in room 304B.

This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of JAN-25-2010 remains on calendar.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
